name: 김태호

appearance_en.face_shape: square reliable face, broad forehead, defined jaw with slight heaviness from age — the face of a man who has endured 25 years of the same desk, the same commute, the same silence
appearance_en.skin: medium Korean skin, indoor desk pallor overlaid on a slightly sallow undertone, deepened nasolabial lines, forehead lines horizontal and permanent, pores visible at cheeks
appearance_en.eyes: dark brown iris, slightly heavy-lidded from decades of accumulation rather than sleep — patient enduring eyes that have learned not to expect too much, gaze often drops before making full contact
appearance_en.nose: broad medium nose, solid rounded tip, fits the squareness of the face without calling attention
appearance_en.mouth: thin-medium lips, habitually pressed closed between words — the mouth of a man who stopped speaking whole sentences years ago
appearance_en.eyebrows: medium-thick straight brows going salt-and-pepper, slightly downward at outer edges from sustained low-level strain — brows furrow before he speaks, releasing slowly
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: deep horizontal forehead creases, deepened nasolabial folds, single vertical line between brows from years of suppressed frowning, no moles or scars
appearance_en.hair: short greying black hair, neatly combed left-side part with some control product, temples and sides noticeably grey, hairline slightly receding, a few hairs escape by end of day

body.proportions: solid medium frame, shoulders still level but slightly dropped from decades of desk posture, mild midsection softening from sedentary corporate life, no muscle definition
body.posture: seated forward-lean habit when working, standing posture settled and heavy — not defeated, just weighted down by time, takes up exactly as much space as needed and no more
body.body_prompt: 174cm solid medium Korean man early 50s, shoulders slightly dropped from decades at desk, settled heavy posture, quiet physical gravity from long endurance

default.description: plain white or pale blue dress shirt, dark tie loosened knot by evening, dark pressed trousers, no jacket at desk — long-serving corporate senior manager uniform
default.wardrobe_prompt: plain white or pale blue dress shirt, dark tie with loosened knot, dark pressed trousers, no jacket, sleeves slightly rolled at end of day

casual.description: plain round-neck tee or open-collar button shirt in grey or beige, dark slacks or comfortable trousers, plain simple shoes
casual.wardrobe_prompt: plain round-neck tee or open-collar button shirt in grey or beige, dark comfortable slacks, plain shoes, no accessories

stressed.description: same shirt with tie fully removed and draped over chair, collar open, arms resting heavily on desk or table, weight visible in posture
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same dress shirt with tie removed, collar open, posture settled and heavy, weight bearing down visibly

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: stoic default — not cold, not warm, just enduring. The expression of a man who has absorbed decades of small defeats and learned to continue anyway
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: square-faced Korean man early 60s, heavy-lidded patient dark eyes, salt-and-pepper medium-thick brows with slight downward outer edges, deep horizontal forehead lines, nasolabial folds, short greying neatly combed hair with receding temples, broad medium nose, thin-medium habitually closed lips, 174cm solid settled medium frame, indoor office pallor, quiet stoic exhausted gravity

style_prompt: masako style illustration, manga ink lines, subdued screen tone shading, grey-blue muted corporate palette, cinematic Korean drama composition, stoic heavy emotion, decades of endurance in stillness
negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, western comic, young, energetic, athletic, cheerful
